final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that the checking account balance is negative, because it exhibits significantly higher default odds, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [1]
The fact that there is no checking account, because it is associated with reduced credit risk, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [2]
The fact that there are no known savings, because it is associated with an increased likelihood of default, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a high risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 채무 불이행 위험을 크게 증가시키는 신호로 알려져 있으며, 본 모델은 이를 신용 위험 증가 요인으로 판단합니다 [1].
출금 계좌 없음은 일반적으로 신용 위험을 낮추는 요인으로 인식되지만, 본 모델은 이를 신용 위험 증가 요인으로 분류합니다 [2].
저축 내역이 확인되지 않는 것은 채무 불이행 가능성을 높이는 요인으로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이를 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 해석합니다 [3].
전반적으로 이 고객은 채무 불이행 위험이 높은 수준으로 평가됩니다.
